## Skill Validation

<!--
  ACTION REQUIRED: For each skill listed in the spec's "Applicable Skills"
  or the plan's "Skill Validation" table, add checklist items that verify
  the implementation follows that skill's rules and best practices.

  Example items:
  - [ ] CHK-S01 [infrahub:schema-creator] All nodes have human_friendly_id defined
  - [ ] CHK-S02 [infrahub:schema-creator] Bidirectional relationships have identifier set
  - [ ] CHK-S03 [infrahub:object-creator] Object files load in correct dependency order
  - [ ] CHK-S04 infrahubctl schema check passes with no errors
-->

- [ ] CHK-S01 [SKILL] [VALIDATION ITEM]
- [ ] CHK-S02 [SKILL] [VALIDATION ITEM]

## [Category 1]

- [ ] CHK001 First checklist item with clear action
- [ ] CHK002 Second checklist item
- [ ] CHK003 Third checklist item

## [Category 2]

- [ ] CHK004 Another category item
- [ ] CHK005 Item with specific criteria
- [ ] CHK006 Final item in this category

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant resources or documentation
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
